rules: Do not modify or replace any source or binary bound to a no-touch worktree.
Do not deploy, activate live money, rotate credentials, or alter production data.
Do not merge condensed path until the previous release is restorable from explicit rollback instructions.
Rollback for any checkpoint: `git checkout condense/black-hole -- .` is wrong; use `git reset --hard <checkpoint-parent>` on the condense worktree only; the base release is origin/main @ 96a4890.
